name: State Street Spdr S&P/Asx 200 Listed Property Etf
analysis: SLF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$13.3400, stop A$12.6423, target A$15.4331 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
